identity.role: the built PaneForge product layer packaged as an installable local workspace tool

validated_claims: The tool installs editable via pip and registers the paneforge console command.
The tool resolves the product root in order: PANEFORGE_PRODUCT env, vendored _product, repo-relative production/products/PaneForge-Stick, known workspace roots.
The kernel runs unmodified under the tool and answers /api/health, /api/kernel, /api/receipts.
Event Law holds live: each new event mints a receipt carrying exactly two links (crystal id, previous receipt hash) with valid:True and delta_phi = -ln(phi)/16.
SpeedLight reuse holds: an identical repeat event does not mint a second receipt.
The full product test suite passes through the tool: 83 passed, 0 failed.
Receipts and crystals are written to PANEFORGE_DATA (default ~/.paneforge), never into the package or repo.
local_workspace_install: D:/CQE_CMPLX/workspace-tools/paneforge (vendored product copy for position independence)

verification.result: 83/83 product tests passed; Event Law receipt chain verified live (2-link receipts, SpeedLight reuse)

open_obligations: Publish paneforge-tool to the internal package index per DISTRIBUTION_PLAN.md.
Bind paneforge info output to the production/proof-receipts schema.
Repeat the product->workspace-tool pattern for Product Fourpack entropy and sentinel.
notes: First instance of the product->workspace-tool promotion pattern. The kernel is the Event Law reference implementation and is wrapped, not forked: the tool adds resolution, data boundary, and lifecycle only.
